jobs.how_to_apply: Candidates are requested to fill out the application form (attached to this notification) correctly in all respects. The completed application form must be submitted along with original documents, a set of attested copies of the required documents, and two recent passport-sized photographs at the interview venue for verification. An interview will be conducted, and candidates will be shortlisted based on their credentials and performance in the personal interview. Eligible candidates will be offered engagement based on merit and the number of vacancies, after verification of their records.
